description: Minimum release gate for LLM Gateway eval runs. It is intentionally simple and explainable for product review.

release_decisions.allow: All hard and soft gates pass. The prompt, model, or route change can proceed.
release_decisions.review: Quality passed but cost, latency, or fallback is outside threshold. Product and engineering review is required.
release_decisions.block: Quality or blocked failure tags failed. Do not release before fixing the regression.
